home.title: Your feed
home.interestsBanner: Set up your interests to activate AI
home.interestsBannerHint: Without interests, articles are not scored or filtered. Tap here to go to Settings.

feed.noRelevantHint: No articles with score ≥ {threshold} yet. Try lowering the threshold in Settings.
feed.noArticlesHint: Add feeds and refresh them to start seeing articles.
feed.allReadEmptyHint: Switch to «All» to see your history.

digest.summary: {count, plural, one {Summary of # unread article} other {Summary of # unread articles}}
digest.noUnread: No unread articles in this feed.

topic.placeholder: E.g. I want news about AI applied to productivity, no fundraising or investment…
topic.suggests: {count, plural, one {Claude suggests # feed} other {Claude suggests # feeds}} — select the ones you want:
topic.notFound: Claude couldn't find queries for that text

opml.importSuccess: {count, plural, one {# feed imported} other {# feeds imported}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.interestsDescription: Claude uses this to score each article from 0 to 100.
settings.interestsPlaceholder: I'm interested in AI, software development, product design, startups…
settings.interestsHint: Describe in natural language what you want to read. Claude will use this to score articles from 0 to 100.
settings.thresholdHint: You'll only see articles with score ≥ {threshold}. Higher = fewer, more relevant articles.
settings.syncDescription: Feeds update automatically every hour via QStash. You can force a sync manually.
settings.syncHint: Background process — may take a few minutes with many feeds. You can also update individual feeds from their detail page.
settings.diagnosticsDescription: QStash cron status and AI scoring health.
settings.importDescription: Import your subscriptions from Feedly or another reader via OPML.
settings.pushDescription: Get notified when new high-score articles arrive.
settings.rescoreDescription: Re-scores your unread articles using your currently saved interests.

diagnostics.cronNeverHint: Feeds have not been synced via cron yet
diagnostics.noInterestsHint: Set up your interests to enable scoring
diagnostics.pendingHint: {count} pending — will be scored on next cron
diagnostics.needsInterests: Fill in your interests to run the test.
diagnostics.masterScheduleHint: No dispatch schedule found — activate it to enable automatic feed updates.

sync.doneSummary: {count} new articles · {errors, plural, =0 {no errors} other {# feeds with errors}}

saved.title: Saved articles
saved.emptyHint: Tap the bookmark icon on any article to save it here.

push.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
push.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Enable in browser settings.
